---
# Photo-log exhibit-only render. Attachment cover sheet plus a chain-
# of-custody photo grid showing physical evidence items.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-photos.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: Westbridge
county: Hartwell County
city: Northfield
detective-name: Detective J. Hayes

case-number: CR24-087

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is the chain-of-custody photo log for physical items
  recovered from the search of the residence on 04-29-24.

# `photo-log`, `photos`, and `evidence-photos` are accepted as aliases.
exhibit-type: photo-log
exhibit-title: PHYSICAL EVIDENCE PHOTO LOG
exhibit-device: "Detective J. Hayes — Northfield Police Investigations Unit"
exhibit-columns: 2

# Each record carries:
#   item-id      — sequence number ("1", "2", ...)
#   path         — image path (relative to the project root); leave
#                  blank to render a placeholder rectangle
#   description  — what the photo shows
#   timestamp    — when the photo was taken
#   photographer — who took it (or `officer:` as alias)
#
# Leave `path:` blank if you don't have actual photos yet — the
# renderer drops in a labeled placeholder cell.
exhibit-records:
  - {item-id: "1",
     description: "Pill bottle recovered from upstairs bathroom; label partially intact.",
     timestamp: "2024-04-29 14:30",
     photographer: "Det. J. Hayes"}
  - {item-id: "2",
     description: "Samsung Galaxy A10e Smart phone, screen cracked, recovered from kitchen counter.",
     timestamp: "2024-04-29 14:32",
     photographer: "Det. J. Hayes"}
  - {item-id: "3",
     description: "Dell Latitude 5580 laptop, recovered from dining room table.",
     timestamp: "2024-04-29 14:35",
     photographer: "Det. J. Hayes"}
  - {item-id: "4",
     description: "Samsung Galaxy S7 Smart phone, recovered from upstairs bedroom dresser.",
     timestamp: "2024-04-29 14:38",
     photographer: "Det. J. Hayes"}
  - {item-id: "5",
     description: "External flash drive (USB), recovered from kitchen drawer.",
     timestamp: "2024-04-29 14:42",
     photographer: "Det. J. Hayes"}
  - {item-id: "6",
     description: "Receipt fragment, recovered from kitchen waste basket.",
     timestamp: "2024-04-29 14:45",
     photographer: "Det. J. Hayes"}
---
